name: RWBY (Seasons/Volumes 1-3, so far)
description: So I've recently been watching this show (put it off for literal years) & am enjoying it, decided to make a bot for the early story, up until now I've only watched up to like barely any of volume 4 & wanted a bot more centered on that, once i watch the rest I'll probably make more &/or update this one, but no promises. Also there isn't really an initial message so you can sorta add yourself however you want which in all fairness i know people don't like, i don't like it that much either, but i ran out of characters/tokens... so fuck it we ball! I have noticed the bot sorta references what i assume is later season stuff, idfk how i managed that (probably cause i added some other characters seen primarily later for the bot to understand systems of command for Adam even though he's only really in the end of volume 3 for a tiny bit, & even Salem, though not many of her "forces?" other than Cinder, Mercury, & Emerald), but you have been warned.
creator: Alfonzo334
